settings.tagline: Where Dreams Are Polished Into Skills
settings.address: 1st Floor, Jameel Market, Umerkot, Sindh, Pakistan

hero.badge: YOUR GATEWAY TO IT EXCELLENCE • SINCE 1997
hero.title: Where Dreams Are
hero.subtitle: Super Sys-Tech Computers Centre Umerkot empowers learners with industry-relevant computer skills and hands-on training. Board-certified diplomas affiliated with SBTE, NAVTTC, STEVTA & TTB Sindh.

about.title: Leading with Educational Integrity
about.principalMessage: Our mission at Super Sys-Tech has always been to bridge the gap between rural potential and global technology standards. After nearly three decades, our success is reflected in the thousands of professionals leading the digital landscape today.
achievements: 28+ Years of IT Excellence in Umerkot
about.description: Super Sys-Tech Computers Centre Umerkot was founded in 1997 by Ramesh Kumar with a vision to bring quality computer education to the rural areas of Sindh. Over the past 28 years, the institution has grown into Umerkot's premier gateway to IT excellence — producing thousands of skilled graduates who are now contributing to Pakistan's digital economy through freelancing, web development, graphic design, and more.
about.mission: To empower learners with industry-relevant computer skills and hands-on training — whether you're a beginner or looking to upgrade your tech skills.
about.vision: To be the leading institution in Sindh for vocational and technical education, where dreams are polished into skills.

courses.title: D.I.T (Diploma in Information Technology)
courses.description: Our flagship 1-year diploma officially affiliated with the Sindh Board of Technical Education. Covers software, hardware, networking & office tools.

courses.title: C.I.T (Certificate in IT)
courses.description: Fast-track certificate program focusing on essential computer applications and foundation technology skills.

courses.title: Web Development
courses.description: Complete web development training covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript & WordPress. Build responsive websites from scratch.

courses.title: Graphic Design & Video Editing
courses.description: Master Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro and Canva. Create professional designs and edit videos for social media.

courses.title: E-Commerce
courses.description: Learn to sell on Daraz, Amazon & Shopify. Complete training in product listing, inventory management & online store setup.

courses.title: Freelancing & Digital Marketing
courses.description: Start earning online through freelancing platforms. Learn digital marketing, SEO, social media marketing & client handling.

courses.title: Programming (Python, C/C++, Java)
courses.description: Learn programming from scratch. Master Python, C/C++ and Java with hands-on projects and real-world applications.

courses.title: Office Tools (MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
courses.description: Professional training in Microsoft Office Suite — Word, Excel, PowerPoint. Essential skills for every office job.

courses.title: NAVTTC / PM Youth Programs
courses.description: Official implementing partner for government-funded free skill development initiatives including NAVTTC and BBSHRRDB programs.

team.name: Ramesh Kumar
team.bio: Founder of STC Umerkot with 28+ years of experience in technical education.

team.name: Faculty Member
team.bio: Experienced IT professional specializing in hardware and networking.

team.name: Faculty Member
team.bio: Expert in Adobe Creative Suite and modern digital design.

testimonials.name: Ahmed Ali
testimonials.message: STC Umerkot transformed my career. The practical training and certified diploma helped me land my first IT job within months of graduating.

testimonials.name: Saira Banu
testimonials.message: The graphic design course at STC gave me skills that are in demand everywhere. I now work as a freelance designer on international platforms.

testimonials.name: Zubair Khan
testimonials.message: Amazing faculty and hands-on approach to learning. The web development course covered everything from basics to advanced frameworks.
